summary: Plan mode only. repair_candidate.summary: Repair sweetcornna's open contributor PR #87681 on the maintainer-modifiable branch so the four-file Linux exec SIGKILL/OOM diagnostic change clears the current checks-node-core-tooling failure and unstable merge state without broadening scope.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(exec): repair Linux SIGKILL OOM diagnostic hint
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair path for #87681, preserving @sweetcornna's source contribution and attribution.

Scope stays limited to the existing four files:
- src/agents/bash-tools.exec-runtime.ts
- src/agents/bash-tools.exec-runtime.test.ts
- src/process/linux-oom-score.ts
- src/process/linux-oom-score.test.ts

Current blockers from hydrated state:
- checks-node-core-tooling is failing on head 1024eb5e4b853a1335a2c71f95aa1148740bbd42
- mergeable_state is unstable

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/bash-tools.exec-runtime.test.ts
- pnpm -s vitest run src/process/linux-oom-score.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed

Linked refs: #87681, #69242. Historical context: #70419 and #70404. Related but separate diagnostic PR: #89104.
credit_notes: Preserve sweetcornna's authorship and source PR credit for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/87681.
Do not replace the contributor PR unless the repair branch becomes unsafe or unrepairable; maintainer_can_modify is true in hydrated state.

If a guarded Clownfish repair PR is opened instead of updating the contributor branch, its body must include: Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/87681 by @sweetcornna, with attribution retained.
